rag_rules: Insert AGREE annexes only into implementation scopes when binding implementation-level signal routing, not component types.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by anchoring AGREE annexes to the exact component or implementation being modified.
Only reference ports, subcomponents, or connections explicitly declared in the AADL model within AGREE annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` and placed directly within the target implementation block.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) or event ports as numeric/Boolean values in AGREE expressions.
Avoid using subcomponent ports in AGREE clauses unless bound through valid implementation-level variables or data ports.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
